title: Remove the 7th image from the Gallery section

requirements.summary: Remove the Gallery image entry for assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg so it no longer renders as a tile nor appears in the lightbox images list, while keeping the IMG_0552.png exclusion safeguard intact.
acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery grid renders 7 tiles instead of 8.
No tile in the Gallery uses `assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` or fallback `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`.
The removed image cannot be opened in the lightbox (because it is not present in the `images` list).
All remaining Gallery tiles still open correctly in the existing lightbox dialog.
The existing safeguard that excludes `IMG_0552.png` remains in place.

file_operations.description: Edit the `images` array to remove the specific entry whose `uploadSrc` references `assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` (and its fallback `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`, alt `Textile Manufacturing Equipment`), ensuring it is not rendered in the grid and cannot be selected/opened in the lightbox; keep the existing `.filter(img => !img.uploadSrc.includes('IMG_0552.png'))` safeguard unchanged.
